MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Dec-07-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Eunice Chang, appeared for Defendant/moving party
Karen S. Hull, appeared for Plaintiff
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants' Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Request For Production of Documents is Granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiffs' failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiffs are ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiffs, jointly and severally, in the amount of $348.80, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
